title: Fix inlined `function automatic` local variables not initializing on each call
body:
Verilator shows a strange behavior related to local variables with automatic storage duration. I'm probably overlooking something trivial or misinterpreting the spec, please do correct any misunderstanding.

I expect that a local variable with automatic storage duration is freshly allocated when entering the function (_IEEE 1800-2012 LRM_, Section 13.4.2 _Static and Automatic functions_, p. 292). I observe local variables with `automatic` storage duration behave as if they had `static` duration.

I am using Verilator 5.032.
```shell
$ verilator --version
Verilator 5.032 2025-01-01 rev v5.032
```
Also tested with today's master (0507fb46558b1f0826e3feea2b3b5113db6a2d89,  2025-01-23), with the exact same result.

My OS/distribution/machine is GNU/Linux, Ubuntu 20.04, `x86_64`:
```
$ uname -a
Linux ******* 5.15.0-89-generic #99~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Thu Nov 2 15:16:47 UTC 2023 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
$ lsb_release -a
No LSB modules are available.
Distributor ID:	Ubuntu
Description:	Ubuntu 20.04.6 LTS
Release:	20.04
Codename:	focal
```

Here's a patch with a reproducer in Verilator `test_regress` format showing the problem:
```patch
From 0783a3901d6e6f70eca76dfa0ad0f5c815c0ceb9 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Augustin Fabre <augustin.fabre@arm.com>
Date: Thu, 23 Jan 2025 21:04:30 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] Tests: add t_func_automatic

Test automatic function variables lifetime.

Make sure that a variable with automatic storage (the default for free
functions marked `automatic') is freshly allocated when entering the
function (IEEE 1800-2012 LRM, Section 13.4.2 Static and Automatic
functions, p. 292).
---
 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py | 18 +++++++
 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v  | 83 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 101 insertions(+)
 create mode 100755 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
 create mode 100644 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v

diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
new file mode 100755
index 000000000..250edefdc
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+# DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Test automatic function variables lifetime
+#
+# Copyright 2025 by Wilson Snyder. This program is free software; you
+# can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of either the GNU
+# Lesser General Public License Version 3 or the Perl Artistic License
+# Version 2.0.
+# SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-only OR Artistic-2.0
+
+import vltest_bootstrap
+
+test.scenarios('simulator')
+
+test.compile()
+
+test.execute()
+
+test.passes()
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..7114937b8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+// DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Test automatic function variables lifetime
+//
+// Make sure that a variable with automatic storage (the default for
+// free functions marked `automatic') is freshly allocated when
+// entering the function.
+//
+// This file ONLY is placed under the Creative Commons Public Domain, for
+// any use, without warranty, 2025 by Augustin Fabre.
+// SPDX-License-Identifier: CC0-1.0
+
+`define stop $stop
+`define checkh(gotv,expv) do if ((gotv) !== (expv)) begin $write("%%Error: %s:%0d: got=%0x exp=%0x (%s !== %s)\n", `__FILE__,`__LINE__, (gotv), (expv), `"gotv`", `"expv`"); `stop; end while(0);
+
+module t();
+  function automatic int t_queue();
+    int q[$];
+    q.push_back(0);
+    $display("  q: %p", q);
+    return q.size();
+  endfunction
+
+  function automatic int t_scalar();
+    int x;
+    ++x;
+    return x;
+  endfunction
+
+  typedef struct {
+    int y;
+  } Y;
+
+  function automatic int t_struct();
+    Y y;
+    ++y.y;
+    return y.y;
+  endfunction
+
+  class Z;
+    int z;
+  endclass
+
+  function automatic int t_class();
+    Z z = new();
+    ++z.z;
+    return z.z;
+  endfunction
+
+  function automatic void main();
+    $display("queue");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int q = t_queue();
+      $display("  %0d", q);
+      `checkh(q, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("scalar");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int x = t_scalar();
+      $display("  %0d", x);
+      `checkh(x, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("struct");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int y = t_struct();
+      $display("  %0d", y);
+      `checkh(y, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("class");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int z = t_class();
+      $display("  %0d", z);
+      `checkh(z, 1);
+    end
+  endfunction
+
+  initial begin
+    main();
+    $write("*-* All Finished *-*\n");
+    $finish;
+  end
+endmodule
-- 
2.25.1

```

I ran the test with:
```shell
$ ./test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
driver.py: Found 8 cores, using -j 8
==SUMMARY: Left 1  Passed 0  Failed 0  Time 0:00
======================================================================
vlt/t_func_automatic: ==================================================
	export GCOV_PREFIX_STRIP='99'
	export GCOV_PREFIX='/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/obj_dist/gcov_1'
	perl /home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../bin/verilator --prefix Vt_func_automatic -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_func_automatic --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --x-assign unique --make gmake --exe ../obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic__main.cpp --clk clk -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic +define+TEST_DUMPFILE=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/simx.vcd t/t_func_automatic.v   > obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/vlt_compile.log
- V e r i l a t i o n   R e p o r t: Verilator 5.032 2025-01-01 rev v5.032
- Verilator: Built from 0.025 MB sources in 3 modules, into 0.039 MB in 15 C++ files needing 0.000 MB
- Verilator: Walltime 0.019 s (elab=0.001, cvt=0.006, bld=0.000); cpu 0.019 s on 1 threads; alloced 9.352 MB
	make -C obj_vlt/t_func_automatic -f /home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/Makefile_obj --no-print-directory VM_PREFIX=Vt_func_automatic TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic CPPFLAGS_DRIVER=-DT_FUNC_AUTOMATIC  OPT_FAST=-O0 OPT_GLOBAL=-O0 Vt_func_automatic   > obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/vlt_gcc.log
driver: Entering directory '/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_func_automatic'
g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable      -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic___024root.h>" -DT_FUNC_AUTOMATIC   -DVL_LOCK_SPINS=10000 -O0  -c -o Vt_func_automatic__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic__main.cpp
g++ -O0  -I.  -MMD -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable      -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic___024root.h>" -DT_FUNC_AUTOMATIC   -DVL_LOCK_SPINS=10000 -c -o verilated.o /home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/verilated.cpp
g++ -O0  -I.  -MMD -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable      -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic___024root.h>" -DT_FUNC_AUTOMATIC   -DVL_LOCK_SPINS=10000 -c -o verilated_threads.o /home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/verilated_threads.cpp
python3 /home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vt_func_automatic.cpp Vt_func_automatic___024root__DepSet_h6f437e2f__0.cpp Vt_func_automatic___024root__DepSet_h772b888e__0.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__DepSet_h087d36dd__0.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__03a__03aZ__Vclpkg__DepSet_h7e4c43e4__0.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__03a__03aZ__Vclpkg__DepSet_h862883d7__0.cpp Vt_func_automatic___024root__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic___024root__DepSet_h6f437e2f__0__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic___024root__DepSet_h772b888e__0__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__DepSet_hdf690a68__0__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__DepSet_h087d36dd__0__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__03a__03aZ__Vclpkg__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic_t__03a__03aZ__Vclpkg__DepSet_h862883d7__0__Slow.cpp Vt_func_automatic__Syms.cpp > Vt_func_automatic__ALL.cpp
g++ -O0  -I.  -MMD -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable      -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_func_automatic -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic.h>" -DVM_PREFIX_ROOT_INCLUDE="<Vt_func_automatic___024root.h>" -DT_FUNC_AUTOMATIC   -DVL_LOCK_SPINS=10000 -c -o Vt_func_automatic__ALL.o Vt_func_automatic__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vt_func_automatic__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
g++    Vt_func_automatic__main.o verilated.o verilated_threads.o Vt_func_automatic__ALL.a    -pthread -lpthread -latomic   -o Vt_func_automatic
rm Vt_func_automatic__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
driver: Leaving directory '/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_func_automatic'
	export GCOV_PREFIX_STRIP='99'
	export GCOV_PREFIX='/home/xxxxxxxx/src/verilator/test_regress/obj_dist/gcov_1'
	obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic    > obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/vlt_sim.log
queue
q: '{'h0} 
  'h1
q: '{'h0, 'h0} 
  'h2
%Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: got=2 exp=1 (q !== 1)
%Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
Aborted (core dumped)
%Warning: vlt/t_func_automatic: Exec of obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic failed: %Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: got=2 exp=1 (q !== 1)
vlt/t_func_automatic: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic failed: %Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: got=2 exp=1 (q !== 1)
vlt/t_func_automatic: FAILED: Exec of obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic failed: %Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: got=2 exp=1 (q !== 1)
==SUMMARY: Passed 0  Failed 1  Time 0:04

======================================================================
#vlt/t_func_automatic: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_func_automatic/Vt_func_automatic failed: %Error: t/t_func_automatic.v:51: got=2 exp=1 (q !== 1)
		make&& test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py  --vlt
==TESTS DONE, FAILED: Passed 0  Failed 1  Time 0:04
```


The problem also shows when the local variable with automatic storage duration is inside a scoped block, for example with:
```verilog
for (int i = 0; i < 10; ++i) begin
  int q[$];
  q.push_back(i);
  $display("%p", q);
end
```
I expect to see:
```
'{'h0}
'{'h1}
'{'h2}
...
'{'h9}
```

But with Verilator I see:
```
'{'h0}
'{'h0, 'h1}
'{'h0, 'h1, 'h2}
...
'{'h0, 'h1, 'h2, 'h3, 'h4, 'h5, 'h6, 'h7, 'h8, 'h9}
```

I ran the same testcase with QuestaSim, VCS and Xcelium, they all behave in the way I expected (the local variable with automatic storage duration is freshly allocated upon entering the function or the scoped block).

I can't look into fixing this myself. I had a look at the C++ code generated by Verilator, it seems like after inlining and loop unrolling the scoping of each function's local variable is lost, and they become global variables.


Thanks for your time, and for this great tool!
-- Augustin

From 0783a3901d6e6f70eca76dfa0ad0f5c815c0ceb9 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Augustin Fabre <augustin.fabre@arm.com>
Date: Thu, 23 Jan 2025 21:04:30 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] Tests: add t_func_automatic

Test automatic function variables lifetime.

Make sure that a variable with automatic storage (the default for free
functions marked `automatic') is freshly allocated when entering the
function (IEEE 1800-2012 LRM, Section 13.4.2 Static and Automatic
functions, p. 292).
---
 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py | 18 +++++++
 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v  | 83 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 101 insertions(+)
 create mode 100755 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
 create mode 100644 test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v

diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
new file mode 100755
index 000000000..250edefdc
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+# DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Test automatic function variables lifetime
+#
+# Copyright 2025 by Wilson Snyder. This program is free software; you
+# can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of either the GNU
+# Lesser General Public License Version 3 or the Perl Artistic License
+# Version 2.0.
+# SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-only OR Artistic-2.0
+
+import vltest_bootstrap
+
+test.scenarios('simulator')
+
+test.compile()
+
+test.execute()
+
+test.passes()
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..7114937b8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_func_automatic.v
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+// DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Test automatic function variables lifetime
+//
+// Make sure that a variable with automatic storage (the default for
+// free functions marked `automatic') is freshly allocated when
+// entering the function.
+//
+// This file ONLY is placed under the Creative Commons Public Domain, for
+// any use, without warranty, 2025 by Augustin Fabre.
+// SPDX-License-Identifier: CC0-1.0
+
+`define stop $stop
+`define checkh(gotv,expv) do if ((gotv) !== (expv)) begin $write("%%Error: %s:%0d: got=%0x exp=%0x (%s !== %s)\n", `__FILE__,`__LINE__, (gotv), (expv), `"gotv`", `"expv`"); `stop; end while(0);
+
+module t();
+  function automatic int t_queue();
+    int q[$];
+    q.push_back(0);
+    $display("  q: %p", q);
+    return q.size();
+  endfunction
+
+  function automatic int t_scalar();
+    int x;
+    ++x;
+    return x;
+  endfunction
+
+  typedef struct {
+    int y;
+  } Y;
+
+  function automatic int t_struct();
+    Y y;
+    ++y.y;
+    return y.y;
+  endfunction
+
+  class Z;
+    int z;
+  endclass
+
+  function automatic int t_class();
+    Z z = new();
+    ++z.z;
+    return z.z;
+  endfunction
+
+  function automatic void main();
+    $display("queue");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int q = t_queue();
+      $display("  %0d", q);
+      `checkh(q, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("scalar");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int x = t_scalar();
+      $display("  %0d", x);
+      `checkh(x, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("struct");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int y = t_struct();
+      $display("  %0d", y);
+      `checkh(y, 1);
+    end
+
+    $display("class");
+    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) begin
+      int z = t_class();
+      $display("  %0d", z);
+      `checkh(z, 1);
+    end
+  endfunction
+
+  initial begin
+    main();
+    $write("*-* All Finished *-*\n");
+    $finish;
+  end
+endmodule
--
